ddls:
CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college or school */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the college or school */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the college was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the college */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the college */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the college's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "majors" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college or school offering the major */,
  "major_name" TEXT /* Name of the major */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the major */,
  "year_established" INTEGER /* Year the major was established */,
  "accreditation" TEXT /* Accreditation status or body */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's) */,
  "tuition_fee" REAL /* Annual tuition fee for the major */,
  "average_graduation_rate" REAL /* Average graduation rate for the major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_majors_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "broad_disciplines" (
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broad discipline */,
  "discipline_name" TEXT /* Name of the broad discipline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the broad discipline */,
  "year_established" INTEGER /* Year the broad discipline was established */,
  "chairperson" TEXT /* Name of the chairperson overseeing the discipline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "majors_broad_disciplines" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major */,
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broad discipline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id", "discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "admit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admissions record */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major */,
  "admit_gpa_range" TEXT /* GPA range for admits */,
  "admit_rate" REAL /* Admit rate */,
  "enroll_gpa_range" TEXT /* GPA range for enrolled students */,
  "yield_rate" REAL /* Yield rate */,
  "application_fee" REAL /* Application fee for the major */,
  "early_decision_gpa_range" TEXT /* GPA range for early decision admits */,
  "early_decision_admit_rate" REAL /* Admit rate for early decision applicants */,
  "regular_decision_gpa_range" TEXT /* GPA range for regular decision admits */,
  "regular_decision_admit_rate" REAL /* Admit rate for regular decision applicants */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year to which the admissions data pertains */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Name of the applicant */,
  "applicant_email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* Name of the high school attended */,
  "high_school_gpa" REAL /* High school GPA */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of application (e.g., early decision, regular decision) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applicants_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admitted_students" (
  "admitted_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admitted student */,
  "admit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admissions record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Admission decision (e.g., accepted, rejected, pending) */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the admission decision was made */,
  "scholarships_awarded" TEXT /* Scholarships awarded to the student */,
  "financial_aid_needed" INTEGER /* Whether the student needs financial aid */,
  "financial_aid_awarded" TEXT /* Financial aid awarded to the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admitted_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admitted_students_admit_id FOREIGN KEY ("admit_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admitted_students_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrolled_students" (
  "enrolled_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrolled student */,
  "admitted_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admitted student */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Enrollment status (e.g., full-time, part-time, withdrawn) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled */,
  "expected_graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date */,
  "current_credits" INTEGER /* Current number of credits completed */,
  "adviser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic adviser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrolled_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrolled_students_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrolled_students_adviser_id FOREIGN KEY ("adviser_id") REFERENCES advisers ("adviser_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrolled_students_admitted_id FOREIGN KEY ("admitted_id") REFERENCES admitted_students ("admitted_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "enrolled_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrolled student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the student */,
  "graduation_status" TEXT /* Graduation status (e.g., graduated, not graduated) */,
  "cumulative_gpa" REAL /* Cumulative GPA */,
  "current_gpa" REAL /* GPA for the current semester */,
  "number_of_courses" INTEGER /* Number of courses currently enrolled in */,
  "retention_status" TEXT /* Retention status (e.g., retained, not retained) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_enrolled_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrolled_id") REFERENCES enrolled_students ("enrolled_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standardized_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test score */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the standardized test (e.g., SAT, ACT) */,
  "test_score" REAL /* Score on the standardized test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standardized_tests_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the applicant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the applicant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the applicant */,
  "citizenship" TEXT /* Citizenship of the applicant */,
  "languages_spoken" TEXT /* Languages spoken by the applicant */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the applicant */,
  "parent_education_level" TEXT /* Highest education level of the applicant's parents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admissions staff, academic advisor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., admissions trends, enrollment metrics) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL to download the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advisers" (
  "adviser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adviser */,
  "adviser_name" TEXT /* Full name of the adviser */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the adviser */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the adviser */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the adviser */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the adviser belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adviser_id")
)
